candidates.why: This is the primary revenue line from customers and represents top-line sales. The alternative 'Total revenue and income' includes other income, so it is less pure as revenue.
Includes total revenue plus other income; less precise for pure revenue/sales, so not preferred over the more specific customer revenue line.
A balancing item, not an actual reported revenue line; not appropriate for REVT when proper revenue lines exist.

variables.notes: Selected the pure customer revenue line rather than the broader total that includes other income.

candidates.why: Best representation of direct production/input costs in the income statement, appropriate proxy for cost of goods sold.
This is a balance sheet stock of raw materials, not a period expense; therefore not suitable as COGS.

variables.notes: Used income statement raw materials as COGS proxy.

candidates.why: Personnel/employee costs are classic SG&A overhead components and not COGS here.

candidates.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit stock-based compensation within SG&A; clearly an SG&A component.
Typical SG&A-type overhead bucket; not labeled as COGS or D&A.
Explicit SG&A line; although some preview years are nan, per instructions it should be included as a core SG&A component.
Another operating overhead bucket; likely includes SG&A-type expenses rather than direct COGS.
Generic share-based compensation line; typically included in SG&A when not otherwise specified.

final_choice.row_label: Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: No prohibited Total/Balancing rows among candidates. Included explicit SG&A line plus main overhead buckets and stock-based comp as SG&A components.

candidates.why: Explicit R&D expense line in the income statement; primary and most appropriate choice for XRD.
Appears to be an alternate/duplicate mapping, but the explicit non-abbreviated line already exists; this one shows as nan in preview.
Likely capitalized development costs on the balance sheet, not the period R&D expense.

variables.notes: Used the explicit income statement R&D expense line.

candidates.why: Direct interest expense line; primary and most standard measure of interest cost for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest on lease liabilities is a component of interest, but XINT typically uses the main consolidated interest expense line when available.
Capitalized interest is not an expense in the period income statement; not ideal for XINT on its own.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; secondary to the main interest expense line.
This is a stock of debt, not an interest expense; unsuitable for XINT.

variables.notes: Chose the main income statement interest expense line as XINT.

candidates.row_label: Change in fair value equity instruments
candidates.why: Income statement fair value change, not a stock measure of equity; not appropriate for BE.

candidates.row_label: Net income (loss) attributable to equity holders of the company
candidates.why: Flows to equity but is a period result, not the total book equity balance.
Component of equity, but appears empty in preview and is not the total; BE should use total equity if available.
Sub-component of equity (e.g., OCI); not total equity.
Represents equity attributable to shareholders but only appears populated for some years and may exclude non-controlling interests; total equity is more comprehensive for BE.
Explicit total equity on the balance sheet; appropriate measure for book equity BE.
Duplicate labeling of total equity; same concept as 'Total equity'. Either would work, but only one is needed.

variables.notes: Used the balance sheet total equity as the book equity measure.
No minority interest / non-controlling interest line appears in the candidate set; treated as absent (0).
